code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream] --> NormalOperation: Sistem Başlatıldı
    
    state NormalOperation {IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] --> BaselineEstablishment
        
        state BaselineEstablishment {IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] --> HistoricalDataCollection
            HistoricalDataCollection --> PatternLearning: Geçmiş Veri Toplandı
            PatternLearning --> NormalProfileCreation: Patern Öğrenildi
            NormalProfileCreation --> ThresholdCalculation: Normal Profil Oluşturuldu
            ThresholdCalculation --> BaselineReady: Eşikler Hesaplandı
        }
        
        BaselineEstablishment --> ContinuousMonitoring: Baseline Hazır
        
        state ContinuousMonitoring {IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic] --> RealtimeDataCollection
            RealtimeDataCollection --> StatisticalAnalysis: Anlık Veri Toplanıyor
            
            state StatisticalAnalysis {IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] --> MeanCalculation
                MeanCalculation --> VarianceAnalysis: Ortalama Hesaplandı
                VarianceAnalysis --> StandardDeviationCheck: Varyans Analizi
                StandardDeviationCheck --> TrendAnalysis: Standart Sapma Kontrolü
                TrendAnalysis --> AnalysisComplete: Trend Analizi
            }
            
            StatisticalAnalysis --> FrequencyDomainAnalysis: İstatistik Tamamlandı
            
            state FrequencyDomainAnalysis {IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker] --> FFTTransform
                FFTTransform --> HarmonicDetection: FFT Dönüşümü
                HarmonicDetection --> SpectralAnalysis: Harmonik Tespiti
                SpectralAnalysis --> FrequencyAnomalyCheck: Spektral Analiz
            }
            
            FrequencyDomainAnalysis --> RealtimeDataCollection: Devam Et
        }
    }
    
    NormalOperation --> AnomalyDetectionTriggered: Anormallik Şüphesi
    
    state AnomalyDetectionTriggered {IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] --> InitialAlert
        InitialAlert --> ConfidenceScoring: İlk Alarm
        
        state ConfidenceScoring {IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic] --> MultiMetricEvaluation
            MultiMetricEvaluation --> CorrelationAnalysis: Çoklu Metrik Değerlendirme
            CorrelationAnalysis --> BayesianInference: Korelasyon Analizi
            BayesianInference --> ConfidenceCalculated: Bayesian Çıkarım
        }
        
        ConfidenceScoring --> SeverityClassification: Güven Skoru Hesaplandı
        
        state SeverityClassification {IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream] --> LowSeverity
            [IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] --> MediumSeverity
            [IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker] --> HighSeverity
            [IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode] --> CriticalSeverity
            
            LowSeverity --> ClassificationComplete: Düşük Önem
            MediumSeverity --> ClassificationComplete: Orta Önem
            HighSeverity --> ClassificationComplete: Yüksek Önem
            CriticalSeverity --> ClassificationComplete: Kritik Önem
        }
    }
    
    AnomalyDetectionTriggered --> ThreatIntelligence: Sınıflandırma Tamamlandı
    AnomalyDetectionTriggered --> NormalOperation: Yanlış Alarm
    
    state ThreatIntelligence {IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker] --> SignatureMatching
        SignatureMatching --> BehavioralAnalysis: İmza Eşleştirme
        
        state BehavioralAnalysis {IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode] --> PatternRecognition
            PatternRecognition --> AttackVectorIdentification: Patern Tanıma
            AttackVectorIdentification --> TTPAnalysis: Saldırı Vektörü Belirlendi
            TTPAnalysis --> AttributionAttempt: TTP Analizi
        }
        
        BehavioralAnalysis --> ThreatConfirmed: Davranış Analizi Tamamlandı
    }
    
    ThreatIntelligence --> ResponseStrategy: Tehdit Onaylandı
    
    state ResponseStrategy {IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker] --> StrategySelection
        
        state StrategySelection {IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic] --> PassiveMonitoring
            [IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic] --> ActiveMitigation
            [IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker] --> AggressiveContainment
            
            PassiveMonitoring --> StrategyChosen: Düşük Önem İçin
            ActiveMitigation --> StrategyChosen: Orta Önem İçin
            AggressiveContainment --> StrategyChosen: Yüksek Önem İçin
        }
        
        StrategySelection --> ActionPlanGeneration: Strateji Seçildi
        
        state ActionPlanGeneration {IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker] --> ResourceAllocation
            ResourceAllocation --> PriorityAssignment: Kaynak Tahsisi
            PriorityAssignment --> TimelineEstablishment: Öncelik Atandı
            TimelineEstablishment --> PlanReady: Zaman Çizelgesi Oluşturuldu
        }
    }
    
    ResponseStrategy --> MitigationExecution: Plan Hazır
    
    state MitigationExecution {IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream] --> ImmediateActions
        
        state ImmediateActions {IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] --> RateLimiting
            RateLimiting --> LoadThrottling: Hız Sınırlama
            LoadThrottling --> ConnectionFiltering: Yük Azaltma
            ConnectionFiltering --> ImmediateComplete: Bağlantı Filtreleme
        }
        
        ImmediateActions --> ShortTermDefense: Acil Önlemler Alındı
        
        state ShortTermDefense {IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream] --> TrafficShaping
            TrafficShaping --> AdaptiveFiltering: Trafik Şekillendirme
            AdaptiveFiltering --> DynamicThresholdAdjustment: Adaptif Filtreleme
            DynamicThresholdAdjustment --> ShortTermComplete: Dinamik Eşik Ayarı
        }
        
        ShortTermDefense --> LongTermMitigation: Kısa Vade Tamamlandı
        
        state LongTermMitigation {IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic] --> SourceIsolation
            SourceIsolation --> NetworkSegmentation: Kaynak İzolasyonu
            NetworkSegmentation --> PolicyEnforcement: Ağ Segmentasyonu
            PolicyEnforcement --> LongTermComplete: Politika Uygulandı
        }
    }
    
    MitigationExecution --> ForensicAnalysis: Önlemler Alındı
    
    state ForensicAnalysis {IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream] --> EvidenceCollection
        
        state EvidenceCollection {IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode] --> LogAggregation
            LogAggregation --> NetworkTrafficCapture: Log Toplama
            NetworkTrafficCapture --> MemoryDump: Ağ Trafiği Yakalandı
            MemoryDump --> ArtifactPreservation: Bellek Dökümü
            ArtifactPreservation --> EvidenceSecured: Kanıt Korundu
        }
        
        EvidenceCollection --> RootCauseAnalysis: Kanıt Toplandı
        
        state RootCauseAnalysis {IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker] --> TimelineReconstruction
            TimelineReconstruction --> VectorAnalysis: Zaman Çizelgesi Yeniden Yapılandı
            VectorAnalysis --> VulnerabilityIdentification: Vektör Analizi
            VulnerabilityIdentification --> ImpactAssessment: Zafiyet Belirlendi
            ImpactAssessment --> RootCauseFound: Etki Değerlendirmesi
        }
        
        RootCauseAnalysis --> ReportGeneration: Kök Neden Bulundu
        
        state ReportGeneration {IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker] --> ExecutiveSummary
            ExecutiveSummary --> TechnicalDetails: Yönetici Özeti
            TechnicalDetails --> RecommendationsCreation: Teknik Detaylar
            RecommendationsCreation --> ReportComplete: Öneriler Oluşturuldu
        }
    }
    
    ForensicAnalysis --> RecoveryPhase: Analiz Tamamlandı
    
    state RecoveryPhase {IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] --> SystemRestoration
        
        state SystemRestoration {IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode] --> ServiceValidation
            ServiceValidation --> IntegrityCheck: Servis Doğrulama
            IntegrityCheck --> ConfigurationReview: Bütünlük Kontrolü
            ConfigurationReview --> RestorationComplete: Yapılandırma İncelemesi
        }
        
        SystemRestoration --> SecurityHardening: Sistem Geri Yüklendi
        
        state SecurityHardening {IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode] --> PatchManagement
            PatchManagement --> ConfigurationUpdate: Yama Yönetimi
            ConfigurationUpdate --> PolicyRefinement: Yapılandırma Güncellendi
            PolicyRefinement --> HardeningComplete: Politika İyileştirme
        }
        
        SecurityHardening --> MonitoringEnhancement: Güvenlik Sertleştirildi
        
        state MonitoringEnhancement {IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker] --> NewSignatureDeployment
            NewSignatureDeployment --> ThresholdTuning: Yeni İmza Dağıtıldı
            ThresholdTuning --> AlertOptimization: Eşik Ayarı
            AlertOptimization --> EnhancementComplete: Alarm Optimizasyonu
        }
    }
    
    RecoveryPhase --> LessonsLearned: İyileştirme Tamamlandı
    
    state LessonsLearned {IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream] --> PostIncidentReview
        PostIncidentReview --> TeamDebriefing: Olay Sonrası İnceleme
        TeamDebriefing --> ProcessImprovement: Ekip Bilgilendirme
        ProcessImprovement --> KnowledgeBaseUpdate: Süreç İyileştirme
        KnowledgeBaseUpdate --> TrainingUpdate: Bilgi Tabanı Güncellendi
        TrainingUpdate --> LessonsDocumented: Eğitim Güncellendi
    }
    
    LessonsLearned --> NormalOperation: Dersler Belgelendi
    
    MitigationExecution --> EscalationRequired: Önlemler Yetersiz
    
    state EscalationRequired {IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic] --> IncidentEscalation
        IncidentEscalation --> ManagementNotification: Olay Yükseltildi
        ManagementNotification --> ExternalSupport: Yönetime Bildirildi
        ExternalSupport --> CrisisManagement: Dış Destek Çağrıldı
        CrisisManagement --> EmergencyProtocol: Kriz Yönetimi
        EmergencyProtocol --> SystemShutdown: Acil Durum Protokolü
    }
    
    EscalationRequired --> EmergencyRecovery: Sistem Kapatıldı
    
    state EmergencyRecovery {IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] --> DisasterRecoveryPlan
        DisasterRecoveryPlan --> BackupActivation: Felaket Kurtarma Planı
        BackupActivation --> FailoverExecution: Yedek Aktivasyonu
        FailoverExecution --> BusinessContinuity: Failover Yürütüldü
        BusinessContinuity --> EmergencyComplete: İş Sürekliliği
    }
    
    EmergencyRecovery --> RecoveryPhase: Acil Durum Atlatıldı
    
    [IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream]

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为工业物联网遥测流设计一个完整的安全状态机。系统启动后应该进入NormalOperation状态，首先建立行为基线。
明白，基线建立阶段需要包含哪些具体步骤？是直接从历史数据开始，还是需要先配置采集参数？
基线建立应该包含四个顺序步骤：HistoricalDataCollection收集历史数据，然后PatternLearning进行模式学习，接着NormalProfileCreation创建正常配置文件，最后ThresholdCalculation计算阈值。
好的，基线建立子状态机已完成。基线就绪后进入ContinuousMonitoring，这里需要实时数据采集和统计分析。
ContinuousMonitoring里的StatisticalAnalysis需要更详细的设计，包含均值计算、方差分析、标准差检查和趋势分析四个环节。
确认，StatisticalAnalysis子状态机已添加。另外我注意到还需要频域分析，是否并行处理？
是的，统计分析完成后进入FrequencyDomainAnalysis，包含FFT变换、谐波检测和频谱分析。完成后循环回到RealtimeDataCollection持续监控。
ContinuousMonitoring结构已完成。现在处理异常检测触发分支，当检测到异常嫌疑时进入AnomalyDetectionTriggered状态。
异常触发后首先产生InitialAlert，然后进行ConfidenceScoring置信度评分。评分需要多指标评估、相关性分析和贝叶斯推理。
贝叶斯推理完成后，SeverityClassification严重性分级应该如何设计？需要几个级别？
严重性分为四级：LowSeverity低严重性、MediumSeverity中等、HighSeverity高严重性、CriticalSeverity关键级。所有级别完成后都进入ClassificationComplete。
AnomalyDetectionTriggered结构已完成。分级完成后有两个出口：进入ThreatIntelligence进行威胁情报分析，或者返回NormalOperation如果是误报。
ThreatIntelligence先做SignatureMatching签名匹配，然后进入BehavioralAnalysis行为分析，包含模式识别、攻击向量识别、TTP分析和溯源尝试。
威胁情报模块已完成。威胁确认后进入ResponseStrategy响应策略阶段，这里需要设计策略选择机制。
StrategySelection包含三种策略：PassiveMonitoring被动监控对应低严重性，ActiveMitigation主动缓解对应中等，AggressiveContainment激进遏制对应高严重性。
策略选定后进入ActionPlanGeneration行动计划生成，这个子状态机需要包含哪些步骤？
行动计划生成包含ResourceAllocation资源分配、PriorityAssignment优先级分配、TimelineEstablishment时间线建立，最后PlanReady计划就绪。
ResponseStrategy已完成。计划就绪后进入MitigationExecution缓解执行阶段，这里需要设计分层防御机制。

缓解执行分为三层：ImmediateActions立即行动包含RateLimiting速率限制、LoadThrottling负载节流、ConnectionFiltering连接过滤；ShortTermDefense短期防御包含TrafficShaping流量整形、AdaptiveFiltering自适应过滤、DynamicThresholdAdjustment动态阈值调整；LongTermMitigation长期缓解包含SourceIsolation源隔离、NetworkSegmentation网络分段、PolicyEnforcement策略执行。
三层缓解机制已完整实现。缓解完成后进入ForensicAnalysis取证分析阶段。
取证分析包含三个子状态：EvidenceCollection证据收集、RootCauseAnalysis根本原因分析、ReportGeneration报告生成。证据收集需要日志聚合、网络流量捕获、内存转储和工件保存。
证据收集模块已完成。根本原因分析需要重建时间线吗？
是的，RootCauseAnalysis包含TimelineReconstruction时间线重建、VectorAnalysis向量分析、VulnerabilityIdentification漏洞识别、ImpactAssessment影响评估。
根本原因分析已完成。报告生成包含ExecutiveSummary执行摘要、TechnicalDetails技术细节、RecommendationsCreation建议创建。
取证分析完成后进入RecoveryPhase恢复阶段，包含SystemRestoration系统恢复、SecurityHardening安全加固、MonitoringEnhancement监控增强三个子状态。
系统恢复需要验证服务完整性吗？还是直接恢复配置？
系统恢复包含ServiceValidation服务验证、IntegrityCheck完整性检查、ConfigurationReview配置审查，确保恢复后的系统安全可靠。
系统恢复模块已完成。安全加固包含PatchManagement补丁管理、ConfigurationUpdate配置更新、PolicyRefinement策略优化。
监控增强需要部署NewSignatureDeployment新签名、ThresholdTuning阈值调优、AlertOptimization告警优化，防止类似事件再次发生。
RecoveryPhase已完成。恢复阶段结束后进入LessonsLearned经验教训总结，最后返回NormalOperation。
LessonsLearned包含PostIncidentReview事后审查、TeamDebriefing团队汇报、ProcessImprovement流程改进、KnowledgeBaseUpdate知识库更新、TrainingUpdate培训更新，形成闭环。
主流程基本完整了。但我注意到MitigationExecution应该有一个异常分支，如果缓解措施不足以控制威胁怎么办？
非常重要的补充。当缓解措施不足时，需要进入EscalationRequired升级需求状态，包含IncidentEscalation事件升级、ManagementNotification管理通知、ExternalSupport外部支持、CrisisManagement危机管理、EmergencyProtocol紧急协议，最终可能执行SystemShutdown系统关闭。
升级流程已添加。系统关闭后需要设计EmergencyRecovery紧急恢复机制，确保业务连续性。
EmergencyRecovery包含DisasterRecoveryPlan灾难恢复计划、BackupActivation备份激活、FailoverExecution故障转移执行、BusinessContinuity业务连续性保障，完成后进入正常的RecoveryPhase。
整个状态机结构已经完整。让我检查一下各组件的关联关系，确保所有IoT工业组件都正确映射到对应的状态。
检查时发现BaselineEstablishment中的HistoricalDataCollection应该关联到ActuatorController，PatternLearning和后续步骤也需要明确组件归属。
已修正，BaselineEstablishment整体关联到ActuatorController。另外ContinuousMonitoring中的RealtimeDataCollection应该关联到PLC_Logic。
正确。StatisticalAnalysis也关联到ActuatorController，FrequencyDomainAnalysis关联到MQTT_Broker，这样组件分配比较均衡。
组件关联已调整。AnomalyDetectionTriggered中的InitialAlert和ConfidenceScoring都关联到ActuatorController，SeverityClassification关联到TelemetryStream。
SeverityClassification的四个级别需要分别关联不同组件：LowSeverity到TelemetryStream，MediumSeverity到ActuatorController，HighSeverity到MQTT_Broker，CriticalSeverity到EdgeNode，体现不同严重级别需要不同层级的设备响应。
严重性分级组件关联已完成。ThreatIntelligence的SignatureMatching和BehavioralAnalysis分别关联到MQTT_Broker和EdgeNode。
ResponseStrategy整体关联到MQTT_Broker，其中StrategySelection关联到PLC_Logic，ActionPlanGeneration回到MQTT_Broker。
响应策略组件关联已完成。MitigationExecution关联到TelemetryStream，其中ImmediateActions关联到ActuatorController。
ShortTermDefense也关联到TelemetryStream，LongTermMitigation关联到PLC_Logic，这样分层缓解的组件分配合理。
缓解执行组件关联已完成。ForensicAnalysis关联到TelemetryStream，EvidenceCollection关联到EdgeNode。
RootCauseAnalysis和ReportGeneration都关联到MQTT_Broker，因为需要分析网络层面的攻击路径并生成综合报告。
取证分析组件关联已完成。RecoveryPhase关联到ActuatorController，SystemRestoration和SecurityHardening都关联到EdgeNode。
MonitoringEnhancement关联到MQTT_Broker，负责新签名部署和阈值调优。LessonsLearned关联回TelemetryStream作为整体流程的收尾。
恢复和经验总结组件关联已完成。EscalationRequired关联到PLC_Logic，EmergencyRecovery关联到ActuatorController。
我需要确认一下状态转换的标注是否准确。从TelemetryStream到NormalOperation的转换标注为"Sistem Başlatıldı"，这是土耳其语，需要改为中文"系统已启动"。
已修正，启动转换标注改为"系统已启动"。HistoricalDataCollection到PatternLearning的转换标注为"历史数据已收集"，PatternLearning到NormalProfileCreation为"模式已学习"。
继续检查其他转换标注。NormalProfileCreation到ThresholdCalculation应为"正常配置文件已创建"，ThresholdCalculation到BaselineReady为"阈值已计算"。
基线建立阶段的转换标注已更新。BaselineEstablishment到ContinuousMonitoring为"基线已就绪"，RealtimeDataCollection到StatisticalAnalysis为"实时数据收集中"。
StatisticalAnalysis内部的转换标注：MeanCalculation到VarianceAnalysis为"平均值已计算"，VarianceAnalysis到StandardDeviationCheck为"方差分析"，StandardDeviationCheck到TrendAnalysis为"标准差检查"，TrendAnalysis到AnalysisComplete为"趋势分析"。
统计分析内部转换标注已完成。StatisticalAnalysis到FrequencyDomainAnalysis为"统计完成"，FrequencyDomainAnalysis循环回RealtimeDataCollection为"继续"。
NormalOperation到AnomalyDetectionTriggered的转换标注为"异常嫌疑"，AnomalyDetectionTriggered返回NormalOperation为"误报"。这两个标注很关键，需要准确。
关键转换标注已确认。AnomalyDetectionTriggered到ThreatIntelligence为"分类完成"，ThreatIntelligence到ResponseStrategy为"威胁已确认"。
SeverityClassification内部的四个级别转换标注分别为"低严重性"、"中等严重性"、"高严重性"、"关键严重性"，都汇聚到ClassificationComplete。
严重性分级转换标注已完成。ResponseStrategy到MitigationExecution为"计划已就绪"，MitigationExecution到ForensicAnalysis为"措施已采取"。
MitigationExecution到EscalationRequired的转换标注为"措施不足"，这个分支很重要。EscalationRequired到EmergencyRecovery为"系统已关闭"。
升级和紧急恢复转换标注已完成。EmergencyRecovery到RecoveryPhase为"紧急情况已度过"，ForensicAnalysis到RecoveryPhase为"分析完成"。
RecoveryPhase到LessonsLearned为"改进完成"，LessonsLearned返回NormalOperation为"经验已记录"，形成完整闭环。
整个工业物联网安全状态机已完成。包含完整的基线建立、持续监控、异常检测、威胁情报、响应策略、缓解执行、取证分析、恢复重建、经验总结九大阶段，以及紧急情况下的升级和灾难恢复分支。所有组件关联和状态转换标注都已确认无误。
